description: Implement strictly read-only Reviewer Context API natively in the MCP server, specifically adding 'get_execution_diff' and 'get_dispatch_state' tools to securely provide workflow state and semantic diff context for reviewer and orchestrator agents.
scope: Add two new MCP tools to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts. 1) get_execution_diff: Accepts a baseline commit hash, runs 'git diff <baseline>', and returns the semantic diff payload. 2) get_dispatch_state: Reads and parses 'workflow/dispatch.json' and returns its contents.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO workflow mutation (write APIs). NO auto-approval logic or decision tree implementation. NO redesign of the reviewer identity. NO artifact discovery expansion (beyond dispatch.json). NO protocol evolution topics.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to modify any artifact outside allowed_artifacts.
Attempting to implement state mutators or workflow progression APIs.
Attempting to execute implementation before an explicit, independent contract review decision is provided.
